name: Realm Eulogy
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>世</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>壊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>賛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>歌</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 monster you control and 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; destroy that monster you control, and if you do, negate that opponent's monster's effects until the end of this turn, then if "Visas Starfrost" is on the field, you can destroy that targeted monster. During your Main Phase, if a "Veda" Monster Card is on the field: You can banish this card from your GY; destroy 1 monster you control. You can only use each effect of "Realm Eulogy" once per turn.
eff: Target 1 monster you control and 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; destroy that monster you control, and if you do, negate that opponent's monster's effects until the end of this turn, then if "Visas Starfrost" is on the field, you can destroy that targeted monster. During your Main Phase, if a "Veda" Monster Card is on the field: You can banish this card from your GY; destroy 1 monster you control. You can only use each effect of "Realm Eulogy" once per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
